info.title: OpenApiDotNet
info.description: A modern OpenAPI client code generator for .NET with NodaTime support

options.name: --output
options.description: Directory where generated code will be placed [default: ./Generated]

options.name: --namespace-prefix
options.description: Strip this dotted prefix from schema names when generating namespaces (e.g. 'Commerce' turns 'Commerce.Order' into 'Order')

options.name: --client-name
options.description: Custom name for the generated client class (default: derived from API title)

options.name: --overlay
options.description: Path to overlay file(s) to apply before generation. Can be specified multiple times.

options.name: --use-nodatime
options.description: Use NodaTime types (Instant, LocalDate, LocalTime, etc.) instead of built-in .NET types for date/time mappings [default: False]

arguments.name: openapi-file
arguments.description: Path to the OpenAPI specification file (JSON or YAML)

commands.name: update
commands.description: Re-generate client code using a previously saved configuration file

commands.name: convert
commands.description: Convert an OpenAPI specification to a specific version and format

arguments.name: openapi-file
arguments.description: Path to the OpenAPI specification file (JSON or YAML)

arguments.name: output-file
arguments.description: Path for the converted output file
